function.message: No recorded message from Badger was found in any channel transcript.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap and folder AGENTS guidance; resolved identity via canonical cast record; read every channel file fully as instructed by task-local hint; absence of any attributed message requires clarification outcome.
function.outcome_justification: The canonical entity file 10_entities/cast/badger.md identifies Badger (alias `badger`). Every transcript in 60_outbox/channels/*.md was read fully, and none contains a message authored by Badger or badger. Therefore the requested 'last recorded message' is missing from available records.
